input: Implement v5.6.1 (UX Polish) for the ceos-agents plugin. Four items from roadmap: (1) --infra flag format: change positional --infra ready,later to self-documenting --infra tracker:ready,sc:later format, (2) Canary-write should ask or announce before creating test item in tracker, (3) Error messages should use user language not MCP jargon — rewrite block messages to say 'Cannot connect to your {type} tracker' instead of 'MCP server for {type} is not available', (4) Resume should allow infrastructure override — detect --infra flag on re-invocation and prefer it over stale state.json values.
